title: No, Trump didn't wear bandage on 'wrong ear' at RNC | Fact check
shortDescription: The footage is flipped to show Trump wearing the bandage on the opposite ear. Trump wore the bandage on his right ear, where he described being shot.

title: SBC executive ousted, reinstated within 48 hours of Biden dropping out
shortDescription: The president of the Southern Baptist Convention Ethics and Religious Liberty Commission praised Biden's decision. He was fired and then rehired.

title: Biden to address nation on 'what lies ahead' after ending presidential bid
shortDescription: President Joe Biden to tell American people 'how I will finish the job' after ending campaign for second term.

title: Lawmakers visit roof used by Trump shooter
shortDescription: On Monday, lawmakers did their own investigation into the assassination attempt against Donald Trump and pushed for answers from the Secret Service.

title: Secret Service Director Cheatle resigns after Trump shooting, hearing
shortDescription: The embattled director had previously said she had no plans to step down but did so amid accusations that her agency failed to protect Donald Trump.

title: What's next after Democrats' gamble on 2024 election? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Vice President Kamala Harris secures delegates needed to become nominee. Delta continues to see major disruptions after last week's IT outage.

title: Protests begin before Netanyahu goes to Congress
shortDescription: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has met with relatives of hostages in Washington, D.C. and will speak to Congress.

title: Trump demands refund for money spent campaigning against Biden
shortDescription: Donald Trump wants a refund for the money spent campaigning against Joe Biden before he exited the 2024 race.

title: Clooney applauds Biden's exit, endorses Harris
shortDescription: The actor and Democratic fundraiser said in a statement Tuesday he supports the VP 'in her historic quest.'

title: Harris-Trump faceoff is likely, but who else is still running?
shortDescription: After Biden dropped out of the presidential election, a Harris-Trump faceoff is likely. But who are the third party candidates still in the race?

title: 'I know Donald Trump's type,' says Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Kamala Harris took aim at Donald Trump in her debut campaign speech.

title: JD Vance takes aim at Biden, Harris during rally
shortDescription: In his second Monday campaign stop, Republican Vice-Presidential nominee Sen. Vance railed against Harris at a rally in Virginia to applause and cheers from a crowd of hundreds.

title: Harris thanks Biden for endorsement
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris thanks President Joe Biden for his endorsement during a campaign press conference in Delaware.

title: 'I'm watching you, kid': Joe Biden dials into Harris's debut to campaign staff
shortDescription: Harris's first visit to her campaign headquarters featured a surprise call from Biden. But the lovefest soon turned to an attack on Trump.

title: With DNC virtual vote ahead, Harris close to locking Democratic nomination
shortDescription: The Democratic National Committee in a new memo says that the nominating process will have an electronic voting component.

title: Democratic lawmakers react to Biden dropping out of 2024 election
shortDescription: Democratic representatives shared their thoughts on the next steps in the presidential nomination process ahead of the Democratic National Convention.

title: How do Harris and Trump compare in recent swing state polls?
shortDescription: Here’s how Harris would fare against Trump in the seven key swing states, according to the most recent polls.
